legacy_original.goal: local playback E2E touches real source, probe, demux, decode, upload/presenter boundary, PCM/WASAPI boundary, clock, seek, lifecycle

pipeline_stages: Real FFmpeg probe of local file

reality_proof_requirements.real_source_reading: Must use actual local file path and read real bytes
reality_proof_requirements.real_ffmpeg_probe: Must call real avformat_open_input and avformat_find_stream_info
reality_proof_requirements.real_ffmpeg_demux: Must call real av_read_frame with real packet data
reality_proof_requirements.real_ffmpeg_decode: Must call real avcodec_send_packet and avcodec_receive_frame
reality_proof_requirements.real_frame_data: Must decode actual pixel/sample data (non-empty frame_data vector)
reality_proof_requirements.real_d3d11_upload: When D3D11 available, must upload real frame data to real texture
reality_proof_requirements.real_pcm_conversion: Must convert real audio samples to PCM
reality_proof_requirements.real_wasapi_output: When WASAPI available, must write real PCM data

required_reality_tests: Real Source Reading Test: Read actual local file bytes
Real Probe Test: Call real FFmpeg probe functions
Real Demux Test: Call real FFmpeg demux functions
Real Decode Test: Call real FFmpeg decode functions
Real Video Upload Test: Upload real frame data to D3D11 (when available)
Real Audio Conversion Test: Convert real audio samples to PCM
Real WASAPI Write Test: Write real PCM data to WASAPI (when available)
Real Clock Test: Track real playback time
Real Seek Test: Perform real seek operation
Real Lifecycle Test: Follow real startup/play/pause/stop/close sequence
test_requirements: All tests must use real FFmpeg functions (not stubs)
Tests must handle device unavailable scenarios honestly
Evidence must prove real runtime, not just state machine

inspector_snapshot_requirements.e2e_pipeline_snapshot: source, probe, demux, decode, upload, conversion, output, clock, seek, lifecycle

decision_ledger_requirements.e2e_decision: Input: file path; Output: success, frames_decoded, frames_uploaded, samples_converted

schema_gate_requirements.source_reading_required: source_reading must be true for RUNTIME_PASS
schema_gate_requirements.probe_result_required: probe_result must be true for RUNTIME_PASS
schema_gate_requirements.demux_result_required: demux_result must be true for RUNTIME_PASS
schema_gate_requirements.decode_result_required: decode_result must be true for RUNTIME_PASS
schema_gate_requirements.anti_fake_validation: no state machine or stub FFmpeg

real_e2e_runtime_proof: Real file reading: actual local file path and bytes
Real FFmpeg demux: av_read_frame with real packet data
Real frame data: non-empty frame_data vector with actual pixels/samples
Real D3D11 upload: when available, real texture with real frame data
Real PCM conversion: real audio samples to PCM
Real WASAPI output: when available, real PCM data to audio device

workspace_requirements: No generated media files in source root

classification_options: RUNTIME_PASS: Real E2E local playback runtime
CONTRACT_PASS: Interface contract proven but not runtime
FAIL: Required proof missing or conflicting
forbidden_claims: Never claim real E2E without real FFmpeg
Never claim runtime PASS if BLOCKED_ENV
Never claim real decode without real frame data
Never claim real upload without real texture

legacy_original.reason: Local E2E runtime audit shows real FFmpeg pipeline with actual probe/demux/decode. Real frame data verified. D3D11/WASAPI tests skip when unavailable (honest). No state machine or stub functions.
